creator: renchap@cocoa-x.com
text:
I tested rubygem-mixlib-cli 1.2.2 with latest Chef port, and it works =
fine for me. MixLibs are developed by Chef authors, and pretty much used =
only for Chef (and the related tools).

Le 21 d=E9c. 2011 =E0 20:34, Philip M. Gollucci a =E9crit :

> You probably can't make this update, lest you will break chef client.
>=20
> Miwi, please be cautious.
>=20
> On 12/21/11 09:26, Renaud Chaput wrote:
>>> Number:         163500
>>> Category:       ports
>>> Synopsis:       [MAINTAINER] devel/rubygem-mixlib-cli: update to =
1.2.2
>>> Confidential:   no
